rules.name: valid_status
rules.description: Enforces the AttendanceRecord.status enum: not_yet_checked_in / present / late / left_early / present_with_note. Enforces the state-machine — not_yet_checked_in → present / late; present → left_early / present_with_note; late → left_early / present_with_note. Terminal states have no forward transitions.
rules.default_message: The attendance status is not a valid enum value or the transition is not allowed.

rules.name: valid_check_in_via
rules.description: Enforces checked_in_via enum: self_kiosk / coach_verified / admin_recorded / geofence / qr_scan. Cross-check against tenant entitlements — geofence requires attendance_geofence; self_kiosk requires attendance_self_kiosk; qr_scan requires attendance_qr_scan.
rules.default_message: The check-in method is not valid or your tenant does not carry the required entitlement.

rules.name: valid_late_penalty_type
rules.description: Enforces AttendancePolicy.late_arrival_penalty_type enum: none / consume_pass_anyway / fractional_pass_consume / notify_only.
rules.default_message: The late-arrival penalty type is not a valid enum value.

rules.name: valid_absence_status
rules.description: Enforces AbsenceRecord.status enum: unexcused / excused / no_show_advance_notice_given / vacation / medical / bereavement. Enforces reversible transition unexcused ↔ excused; other transitions require admin override.
rules.default_message: The absence status is not a valid enum value.

rules.name: valid_grace_period_minutes
rules.description: Refuses grace_period_minutes < 0 OR > 120. Sensible bounds — 0 means 'no grace, immediate late' and 120 minutes is the ceiling before the concept stops meaning 'late for a session'.

rules.name: valid_max_absences
rules.description: Refuses max_unexcused_absences_per_period < 1 OR > 100. Below 1 makes no sense (would freeze on first absence); above 100 makes the freeze meaningless.

rules.name: valid_freeze_period_days
rules.description: Refuses absence_freeze_period_days < 7 OR > 365. Below 7 is too tight to be meaningful; above 365 defeats the purpose of a rolling window.

rules.name: valid_gps_coordinates
rules.description: When gps_lat / gps_lng set, validates gps_lat between -90 and 90 + gps_lng between -180 and 180. Enforces both-or-neither (refuses one set without the other).
rules.default_message: GPS coordinates must be valid decimal degrees, and both lat + lng must be provided together.

rules.name: unique_attendance_per_session_per_athlete
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index. One AttendanceRecord per (tenant_id, session_id, athlete_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL.
rules.default_message: This athlete already has an attendance record for this session.

rules.name: unique_absence_per_session_per_athlete
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index. One AbsenceRecord per (tenant_id, session_id, athlete_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL. Also validates mutual exclusion with AttendanceRecord — the two cannot co-exist for the same (session, athlete).
rules.default_message: This athlete already has an absence record for this session, or an attendance record already exists.

rules.name: valid_signature_url
rules.description: When signature_url_signed set, validates it's HTTPS + hosted on the tenant's approved S3 bucket. Refuses http:// or off-bucket URLs.
rules.default_message: signature_url_signed must be an HTTPS URL on your tenant's approved S3 storage bucket.

rules.name: no_check_in_after_session_end_plus_grace
rules.description: Refuses new AttendanceRecord.creating when checked_in_at > session.ends_at + 48h (post-session correction window closed). Admin override permission bypasses this rule with a documented reason.
rules.default_message: Check-in is not allowed more than 48 hours after the session ended. Contact an admin for post-window corrections.

rules.name: pass_available_when_required
rules.description: When session.requires_pass=true, validates that the athlete's active Membership has an unconsumed Pass in the current period. Refuses check-in with ATTENDANCE_NO_ACTIVE_PASS when none available.
rules.default_message: This session requires an active pass; the athlete does not have an unconsumed pass in the current period.
